TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami_Pawli, title = Pawli, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Amis]}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/wiki/Pawli} }

S.FORM: == pawli == O naitiraay i fa'edetay a kanatal no Malay ato i ka'amisay no Australia ko Karengawan no pawli, isa'ayaway, latek itini Papua New Guinea ko larengawan nira, caay ho ka kiharen no tamdaw, caay kafangcal ko tatapangan no pawli, caay kafangcal ko kaciheci, caay ho ko mamakaen, o nano mipalomaan to no tamdamdaw, saka ci heci to ko kaliyalaway a pawli. Maedeng ira ko 107 a kitakit to palomaay to pawli. O sakaciheciaw no pawli ko samipalomaay, salongan i malosakeliw, sasaepahen, Beer ano eca malalikot ato misakapahan a pinaloma. I 2013 mihecaan nipalomaan a pawli o saka sepat a kakaenen, aikoray no felac, ^mi ato 'ariray. Musa Paradisiaca
S.PHON: == paw…ĺi == o~u naitiraaj i fa °…ô…¨~…ģ…ôtaj a kanata…ĺ no~u ma…ĺaj ato~u i ka °amisaj no~u ao~u~ustra…ĺia ko~u kar…ôŇčawan no~u paw…ĺi, isa °ajawaj, …ĺat…ôk itini papo~u~ua n…ôw *o~u~uin…ôa ko~u …ĺar…ôŇčawan nira, ¶aaj ńßo~u ka kińßar…ôn no~u tam…¨~…ģaw, ¶aaj kafaŇč ¶a…ĺ ko~u tatapaŇčan no~u paw…ĺi, ¶aaj kafaŇč ¶a…ĺ ko~u ka ¶ińß…ô ¶i, ¶aaj ńßo~u ko~u mamaka…ôn, o~u nano~u mipa…ĺo~umaan to~u no~u tam…¨~…ģam…¨~…ģaw, saka ¶i ńß…ô ¶i to~u ko~u ka…ĺija…ĺawaj a paw…ĺi. ma…ô…¨~…ģ…ôŇč ira ko~u *** a kitakit to~u pa…ĺo~umaaj to~u paw…ĺi. o~u saka ¶ińß…ô ¶iaw no~u paw…ĺi ko~u samipa…ĺo~umaaj, sa…ĺo~uŇčan i ma…ĺo~usak…ô…ĺiw, sasa…ôpańß…ôn, b~b~v…ô…ôr ano~u …ô ¶a ma…ĺa…ĺiko~ut ato~u misakapańßan a pina…ĺo~uma. i **** mińß…ô ¶aan nipa…ĺo~umaan a paw…ĺi o~u saka s…ôpat a kaka…ôn…ôn, aiko~uraj no~u f…ô…ĺa ¶, Ēmi ato~u °ariraj. mo~u~usa para…¨~…ģisia ¶a
S.FORM: == pawli == O naitiraay i fa'edetay a kanatal no Malay ato i ka'amisay no Australia ko Karengawan no pawli, isa'ayaway, latek itini Papua New Guinea ko larengawan nira, caay ho ka kiharen no tamdaw, caay kafangcal ko tatapangan no pawli, caay kafangcal ko kaciheci, caay ho ko mamakaen, o nano mipalomaan to no tamdamdaw, saka ci heci to ko kaliyalaway a pawli. Maedeng ira ko 107 a kitakit to palomaay to pawli. O sakaciheciaw no pawli ko samipalomaay, salongan i malosakeliw, sasaepahen, Beer ano eca malalikot ato misakapahan a pinaloma. I 2013 mihecaan nipalomaan a pawli o saka sepat a kakaenen, aikoray no felac, ^mi ato 'ariray. Musa Paradisiaca
S.PHON: == paw…ĺi == o~u naitiraaj i fa °…ô…¨~…ģ…ôtaj a kanata…ĺ no~u ma…ĺaj ato~u i ka °amisaj no~u ao~u~ustra…ĺia ko~u kar…ôŇčawan no~u paw…ĺi, isa °ajawaj, …ĺat…ôk itini papo~u~ua n…ôw *o~u~uin…ôa ko~u …ĺar…ôŇčawan nira, ¶aaj ńßo~u ka kińßar…ôn no~u tam…¨~…ģaw, ¶aaj kafaŇč ¶a…ĺ ko~u tatapaŇčan no~u paw…ĺi, ¶aaj kafaŇč ¶a…ĺ ko~u ka ¶ińß…ô ¶i, ¶aaj ńßo~u ko~u mamaka…ôn, o~u nano~u mipa…ĺo~umaan to~u no~u tam…¨~…ģam…¨~…ģaw, saka ¶i ńß…ô ¶i to~u ko~u ka…ĺija…ĺawaj a paw…ĺi. ma…ô…¨~…ģ…ôŇč ira ko~u *** a kitakit to~u pa…ĺo~umaaj to~u paw…ĺi. o~u saka ¶ińß…ô ¶iaw no~u paw…ĺi ko~u samipa…ĺo~umaaj, sa…ĺo~uŇčan i ma…ĺo~usak…ô…ĺiw, sasa…ôpańß…ôn, b~b~v…ô…ôr ano~u …ô ¶a ma…ĺa…ĺiko~ut ato~u misakapańßan a pina…ĺo~uma. i **** mińß…ô ¶aan nipa…ĺo~umaan a paw…ĺi o~u saka s…ôpat a kaka…ôn…ôn, aiko~uraj no~u f…ô…ĺa ¶, Ēmi ato~u °ariraj. mo~u~usa para…¨~…ģisia ¶a
